author: analyst
summary: ISS-1547 tracker is OBE on all three of its blockers: curmudgeon review complete, drain mode lifted, integration shipped. Recommended action: close.

findings.issue_under_review: ISS-1547 (severity=info, status=assigned-analyst): EXP-249 (Phase B1 pie chart cleanup) ready — pending curmudgeon review. Per drain-mode HNOTE-OPERATOR-DRAIN-MODE-001, curmudgeon queue not pushed at this time. Track here until drain mode lifts.

state_check_1_curmudgeon_review.evidence: monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/EXP-249-proposal.json exists; reviewed_at=2026-04-25T19:43:22.051Z; queue_id=261; popped_by_queue_id_at=2026-04-25T21:23:30.809Z; recommended_action=minor_edit; current_verdict_holds=true; conditional_approval rubric=PROCEED with zero ESCALATE/critical/major findings.

state_check_2_drain_mode.evidence: monitor/decisions/decider-mode.json:mode=bau; auto_revert_fired_at=2026-05-13T13:18:52Z; auto_revert_fired_reason=3 consecutive decider runs with open_count(0) < auto_revert_when_open_below(50). The drain-mode rationale in ISS-1547 description ceased to apply ~5 days ago.

state_check_3_integration_shipped.evidence: build-scripts/generate-html.js contains VERDICT_FILL_TOKENS (line 333), VERDICT_LABEL_TOKENS (line 342), and --label-{refuted,stdmodel,selfcon,misleading,notdemo,unfalsifiable} tokens in :root (line 512), prefers-color-scheme:dark (line 513), and @media print (line 701). All six coupled changes from the EXP-249 acceptance criteria are present in production.

state_check_4_moderate_findings_disposit.evidence: The three moderate curmudgeon findings (H1 visual contradiction, H2 contrast arithmetic, H3 tap-target overclaim) were filed as ISS-1564/1565/1566 (status=closed) with duplicate-merge pre-routes ISS-1554/1555/1556 (status=closed-duplicate). Decider pursued Pathway (a) per the conditional_approval_assessment — inline fixes at integration time rather than v2 redraft.

closure_rationale: All three blockers stated in the issue description have cleared: (1) curmudgeon review complete with PROCEED verdict, (2) drain mode auto-reverted to BAU on 2026-05-13, (3) work integrated into build-scripts/generate-html.js and shipping in current docs/index.html. The three moderate findings curmudgeon raised at review time are tracked separately as ISS-1564/1565/1566 (all closed). ISS-1547 was a routing-time tracker that the M1 sweep default-routed back to analyst on 2026-05-10 (one day before curmudgeon review actually completed in workflow terms; the queue had already received EXP-249 but the issue text predated knowledge of completion). Nothing further is gated by this issue.
